---

Replace the `Closes #` line above with `Closes #<issue-number>` to auto-close the linked issue when this PR merges. Alternate patterns:

- `Refs #<issue-number>` — link to an issue without closing it
- `No related issue: <reason>` — orphan PR (drift sweep, hotfix, refactor)

Closing keywords are case-insensitive: `close`, `closes`, `closed`, `fix`, `fixes`, `fixed`, `resolve`, `resolves`, `resolved`. One keyword per issue; cross-repo uses `Closes <owner>/<repo>#<issue-number>`.
